title: Older Lower Trust Closeout Audit
goal: Resolve #329 by adding a checked-in reconciliation artifact for older lower-trust closeouts surfaced by summary.
Reduce `intent_validation_contract.closeout_reconciliation.items_by_state.needs-audit` for the older set without hiding uncertainty.
non_goals: Do not implement old follow-up work in this audit.
Do not rely on chat-only recollection.
Do not close unrelated roadmap lanes.

intent.outcome: Classify older unreconciled lower-trust closeouts into evidence-present, follow-up-open, or likely-premature-closeout.
intent.constraints: Use checked-in evidence and current open roadmap ownership where possible; keep the artifact compact and consumable by summary.
intent.latitude: Classify conservatively, preferring follow-up-open when broad parent intent remains visible.
intent.escalation: Escalate if any older closed item appears materially premature without an open owner.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, close #329, remove the completed first roadmap lane, and promote the next lane.
execution.proof: Summary no longer reports older items as needs-audit after the artifact is added.

invariants: Follow-up-open classifications name the owner surface or issue.
No implementation claims are made beyond audit evidence.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: machine-first planning state and closeout hygiene

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: The first roadmap lane can stop carrying unresolved lower-trust audit debt after summary confirms no needs-audit items remain from the older set.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Later roadmap lanes remain scheduled in priority order.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The first lane can now close because #324, #323, #325, and #329 resolved its remaining trust blockers. Dogfooding the summary also surfaced #280 and #282 as missing classifications in the earlier #324 audit artifact, so that artifact now records their landed machine-first evidence.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: summary reports zero lower-trust closeout count and zero closeout_needs_audit_count
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: none after archive and lane removal validation

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: finish the remaining first-lane audit debt exposed by the package view
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: write a second review artifact that classifies the older needs-audit IDs
intent_interpretation.review guidance: verify summary consumes the artifact and does not leave older items as needs-audit

execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; git diff --check

stop_conditions.stop when: the older closeout audit is checked in and summary consumes it
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: an item appears premature without an open owner
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: summary still reports the older set as needs-audit

context_budget.live working set: #329 issue body, summary reconciliation output, prior #324 audit pattern, roadmap state
context_budget.recoverable later: full issue comments and every archived historical plan
context_budget.tiny resumability note: classify the 28 needs-audit IDs from summary into a review artifact
context_budget.context-shift triggers: after artifact creation or before commit

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: checked-in artifact, conservative classification, no unrelated implementation
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: exact evidence phrasing and category choice
delegated_judgment.escalate when: a closed item needs reopening and no open follow-up exists

active_milestone.scope: Add one review artifact with issue_classifications for the older needs-audit IDs.

immediate_next_action: Archive this plan, close #329, and promote the next roadmap lane.
invariants: Do not remove the lane until summary confirms the audit debt is classified.
The audit remains machine-readable through issue_classifications.
completion_criteria: The older needs-audit IDs have classifications.
Summary shows those IDs under evidence-present or follow-up-open instead of needs-audit.

execution_run.what happened: Added a second checked-in lower-trust closeout audit artifact for the 28 older needs-audit IDs surfaced by #325. Summary now consumes both audit artifacts and reports zero needs-audit closeouts.
execution_run.changed surfaces: planning active state and execplan; older closeout review artifact
execution_run.validations run: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; git diff --check
execution_run.result for continuation: The machine-first-planning-state lane's audit and archive-cleanup blockers are resolved; next lane is formal-workflow-substrate-follow-through.
execution_run.next step: archive this plan and remove the completed first lane

finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: medium because old historical issues were classified from checked-in product evidence, not full manual issue-comment reconstruction

proof_report.validation proof: `uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json`; `uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py`; `git diff --check`

intent_satisfaction.original intent: audit older unreconciled lower-trust closeouts surfaced by summary reconciliation
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: All 28 older needs-audit IDs from #329 now have checked-in issue_classifications consumed by summary.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The first lane's remaining open trust blockers are #323/#324/#325/#329, all now fixed, audited, or routed in checked-in summary-readable artifacts.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: summary closeout_reconciliation output and the two lower-trust closeout review artifacts
closure_check.reopen trigger: reopen if summary again reports the audited older set as needs-audit

execution_summary.validation confirmed: summary, planning check, and diff check passed
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: archive this execplan and retain both audit artifacts
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): planning review artifact consumed by summary reconciliation

drift_log: 2026-04-26: Active execplan created from #329 after #325 summary reconciliation exposed older needs-audit items.
2026-04-26: Added older lower-trust closeout audit artifact; summary now reports zero needs-audit closeouts.
